record.text: I want to own my website. I want it's content to live on the ATProtocol. Claude is giving me a hand with the implementation. Currently the stack uses Astro. I need demo content on WhiteWind to test it's ability to display my blog posts. This is the aforementioned demo content.
record.title: An ongoing experiment
record.content: I want to own my website. I want it's content to live on the ATProtocol. Claude is giving me a hand with the implementation. Currently the stack uses Astro. I need demo content on WhiteWind to test it's ability to display my blog posts. This is the aforementioned demo content.
